title: Quantum Recognition Using the Quantum Perceptron
author: Chawla, Aman
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: In this note, the authors describe a method by which the quantum perceptron can be trained to recognize whether specic genuinely quantum interactions have taken place with its N ions. This could have implications for quantum fault diagnosis and quantum cloning by learning.
